tree.name: Joan Beringer
tree.note: French center, 2025 #17 overall pick. Pick was originally DET's (top-13 protected), acquired by MIN via NYK in the Karl-Anthony Towns trade.

assetsGivenUp.name: Karl-Anthony Towns
assetsGivenUp.note: Part of KAT trade to NYK (shared cost with Randle/DiVincenzo). See min-julius-randle.json.
